electroacoustic.frequency_range_note: Low-frequency limit is 29 Hz on the [KS21_60] presets and 31 Hz on the [KS21_100] presets (-10 dB). Upper limit is set by preset to either 60 Hz (A15 pairing) or 100 Hz (A10 pairing).
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 138 dB peak at 1 m, half-space, pink noise crest factor 4, on the [KS21_100] preset.
electroacoustic.directivity: Omnidirectional in standard configuration; cardioid (rear rejection) when four enclosures are arrayed with one element reversed using the cardioid presets.
electroacoustic.components: 1 x 21" high-excursion neodymium direct-radiating cone driver in a bass-reflex enclosure with L-Vents (reduces port turbulence/noise and raises LF efficiency).

amplification.preset_note: _C / _Cx presets are for cardioid blocks; the reversed element runs the SR-channel preset while the forward elements run SB. Standard presets route all four amp outputs to SB on input A.

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), interchangeable IN/LINK; subwoofer wired on pin 1+/1- (LF+/LF-), pins 2+/2- not linked
connection.breakouts: Daisy-chain via the LINK connector; SP cables are 4-point speakON, 4 mm2 gauge. CC4FP and PA-COM breakouts available for multi-enclosure cabling.

physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood, dark grey-brown (Pantone 426 C); coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; high-grade anti-corrosion-coated steel rigging components.

deployment.max_per_stacked_array: 3 with no rigging accessory; 4 with KS21-OUTRIG; KS21-CHARIOT: 3 (4 with K2-JACK stabilizers)
deployment.inter_element_angles: Not specified for subwoofer arrays; refer to Soundvision for mechanical limits.
rigging_accessories: Integrated two-point rigging arms with spring-loaded pins
35 mm pole socket with M20x150 insert

usage: Compact 1x21" reference subwoofer built to extend the low end of A15 and A10 line-source systems; its two-point rigging arms let it be flown or stacked inline with A15 to build a true full-range hang.
Each cabinet needs one amplifier channel (8 ohm). Plan one LA12X or LA7.16(i) to drive up to 8 KS21, one LA4X for up to 4, or LA2Xi for 4 (SE) / 2 (bridged).
Pick the upper-limit preset to match the main system: use a _60 preset (29 Hz low limit) when paired with A15, or a _100 preset (31 Hz low limit) when paired with A10.

For directional low end, deploy a block of four with one box reversed and load the cardioid (_C / _Cx) presets to reject energy off the back of the array (good for keeping stage and audience bleed under control).
Keep subs side by side for best coupling; if they must be split, hold acoustic-center spacing within 2.8 m at the 60 Hz crossover or 1.7 m at 100 Hz to avoid combing.

Flown limits are 8 (safe) / 16 (max) per A15-BUMP hang; ground stacks top out at 3 boxes, or 4 with KS21-OUTRIG, and require safety straps above four or when not rigging-locked together. IP55-rated for outdoor use.
